## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Attention and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and technical improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [124 articles published (15 new since last meeting), with 467 total clicks (89 this week vs. 86 last week)](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Plans to enhance content with custom images, infographics, and FAQ sections for improved engagement and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Discovery of unsubmitted sitemaps for attention.com domain, now fixed (3,200 pages discovered)](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Agreement to repurpose podcast content into blog articles and other formats](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [124 articles published, 15 new since last meeting](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Weekly growth: 89 clicks (vs. 86 last week)](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Cumulative: 467 clicks total](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Entire blog section (16 months): 1,320 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [GrowthX articles account for \~1/3 of total blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Top 5 AI tools articles still performing best](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [117 articles indexed, 7 pending](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

### Content Enhancement Strategies

  - [Adding FAQ sections to all articles using SEMrush, "People Also Ask", and Reddit queries](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Revamping hero images and adding custom infographics using Canva](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Creating templates for new image layouts, pending approval](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Aim: Improve Google Image search ranking, increase time on page, and add value](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Thought Leadership Content

  - [Attention team has set up directory pages for industry professionals](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Plan to review these for SEO enhancements once live](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Agreed to repurpose podcast content into blog articles and other formats](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Will start with earliest episodes, aiming for at least one by next week](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [Core Web Vitals issues detected, particularly on mobile](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Desktop performance better than mobile](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [75% site health reported by SEMrush, with some warnings and issues](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [30 URLs needing improvements (e.g., Largest Contentful Paint)](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [202 non-indexed pages discovered](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)

### Sitemap Discovery and Submission

  - [Attention.com domain lacked submitted sitemaps in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Sitemap submitted today, 3,200 pages discovered](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Expected to significantly improve visibility and overall results](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create and implement custom images and infographics for 10 strategic articles](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Develop FAQ sections for existing content](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Begin repurposing podcast content into blog articles, starting with earliest episodes](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Provide detailed technical SEO analysis and recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Brainstorm ideas for directories and programmatic SEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Review and enhance new directory pages once live](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Continue producing high-quality, relevant blog content](https://fathom.video/share/scHizrNHz4mZYvmzbmptcHMTrJz2SFvj?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
